name: Ramen Vegetable Steak Skillet
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons oil, or 1 teaspoon plus spray
3/4 pound beef top sirloin, thinly sliced
1 pound Green Giant American Mixtures, Frozen (Broccoli, Carrots, and Water Chestnuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over Medium-High heat until hot.
2. Add beef; cook and stir for 2-3 minutes or until no longer pink.
3. Crumble ramen noodles.
4. Add noodles, flavor packets, frozen vegetables (broccoli, carrots, water chestnuts), mushroom mixture, and water to the meat. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 5 to 7 minutes or until vegetables are crisp-tender, stirring occasionally.
Steak is easy to slice if it is partially frozen.
Makes 5 servings.
From http://www.greengiant.com
